title: the Art
description: Build a Japanese structures in a visually pleasing world with over 2000 blocks, custom menu and ambiance.
body:
#
the Art Modpack for Minecraft 1.20.4
![thumbnail](https://s14.gifyu.com/images/bsYfp.gif) ##
What is this modpack about?
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a52b42c50b5c1d8ca25ccff965f86bf29fc82809_0.webp) A Modpack for Architectures, Building, and Imagination. the Art is a creative-focused modpack built for designers & creative visionaries inspired by the elegance of Japanese design—from timeless traditions to cutting-edge minimalism. Whether you’re crafting serene temples, cozy countryside homes, or sleek urban spaces, The Art gives you the tools to build with precision and flair. With a carefully curated collection of building-focused mods and a peaceful atmosphere, this is your blank canvas for visual storytelling. Designed primarily for creative mode, this modpack is ideal for dedicated builders—but it also supports survival mode for casual exploration and chill gameplay. _Express your vision. Build your masterpiece. Welcome to The Art._ ##
Socials
![shrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91af50ce167a463a4e6594dbe469710fbe6aa9a3.gif) ##
Key Features
### 🧊 2,000+ Custom Blocks & Furniture A massive selection of detailed building blocks and furnishings—from shoji doors and tatami mats to sleek panels and designer lighting. ### 🦌 Wildlife & Aquatic Life Populate your builds with adorable land animals and ambient sea creatures to create dynamic, living environments. ### 🛠️ Advanced Building Tools World-editing & block-editing tools built for creators: rotate, move, resize, copy-paste, and perfect your world with ease. ### 🖼️ Custom Image Placement Insert your own images and artwork into the game using signs and display blocks. Great for city posters, art galleries, or personal touches. ### 💡 Custom Lighting Controls Fine-tune the atmosphere with adjustable lighting settings, from cozy interiors to cinematic nightscapes. ### 🌅 Distant Horizons & Built-In Shaders Explore vast draw distances and enjoy stunning visual effects with pre-configured shaders for a photo-realistic touch. ### 🧩 Great Optimization Smooth performance even in large, detailed builds thanks to performance-focused mod selections and tweaks. ### 📚 Custom Main Menu A fully redesigned main menu with high-quality visuals, animated elements, and an eye-pleasing UI that matches the tone and beauty of the pack. ### ✳️ Creative Mode First, Survival Compatible While made for builders and designers, the pack still supports survival play for those who enjoy relaxed exploration and storytelling. ### 🌐 Multiplayer Friendly Build together, host architecture showcases, or collaborate on themed villages in peaceful online sessions. ![kes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c658890d6f77382066446ac26123dec52985b6b0.png) ### 🖥️ RAM Allocation: - Recommended Allocated Memory: 8192 - Minimum Allocated Memory: 4096 - Possibly Lowest Allocated Memory: 2048 (not recommended) ![kes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c658890d6f77382066446ac26123dec52985b6b0.png) ##
How to use Yuushya Modelling Mod

![tutorial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21fa965baa8dd6ff00343545f7a056fe12dc24e7.png) ![the art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6efb480632ae0d72cbdd17358199824aef52331.png) ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c47d40a88b6e830d36cd55593764a272356d0fc8_0.webp) ##
Quick Disclaimer
I do not own any of the mods in this pack all credit goes to the original creators. This modpack is non-commercial, and I’m not making any money from this. If any mod author wants their mod removed, I’ll do so immediately. Big thanks to all the amazing mod developers this project wouldn’t exist without you! ![the art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6efb480632ae0d72cbdd17358199824aef52331.png) ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b330c73411a522315e3e28b884209f5bd12b97_0.webp) ##
Mod & Resource Packs highly recommended in this modpack:
1. cocricot for 1.20.4 v1.1 2. cocricot for MOD 1.20.4 snapshot1.1.1 3. cocricotMOD for 1.20.4 Fabric snapshot1.1.0 4. Yuushya Foliage Addon 0.11.0 ![the art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6efb480632ae0d72cbdd17358199824aef52331.png) ![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0844e334a9c21b144a6633ac0d3ccdf9c5e0238_0.webp) ##

1. [Yuushya Foliage Addon 0.11.0](https://yuushya.com/townscape/file/Yuushya%20Foliage%20Addon%200.11.0.zip) 2. [Cocricot Resource Pack for 1.20.4 v1.1](https://cocricot.pics/blog/download/cocricot-for-1-20-4-v1-1) 3. [Cocricot for MOD Resource Pack 1.20.4 snapshot1.1.1](https://cocricot.pics/blog/download/cocricot-for-mod-1-20-4-snapshot1-1-1) 4. [Cocricot MOD for 1.20.4 Fabric snapshot1.1.0](https://cocricot.pics/blog/download/cocricotmod-for-1-20-4-fabric-snapshot1-1-0) ![the art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6efb480632ae0d72cbdd17358199824aef52331.png) ![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7505e550f98aad5f83c94295b4819238220ab394_0.webp) ##
